joinDescription: Go global. Pro unlocks the ladder, cloud backup, and rank tools—for lifters who train like it matters.
joinDescriptionFromLadder: Unlock the global ladder. Climb with the best.
joinDescriptionFromBackup: Turn on cloud sync. Keep every rep on record.
joinDescriptionFromDynoIntel: Unlock Pro for DYNO INTEL smart analysis, the global ladder, and cloud backup—three full channels in one membership.
proFeatureLeaderboardBody: Multi-metric rankings with fast sync — chase the peak seats.
proFeatureCloudSyncBody: Keep assessments and logs backed up in the vault.
proFeatureDynoIntelBody: Pro uplink — deep briefings and cross-axis diagnostics.
identityRequired: Sign in with Google to use the arena on any device.
googleLoginFail: Sign in with Google to continue. Allow pop-ups if needed.
betaOpenAccess: Genesis early bird: the first {{count}} signed-in pilots get free ladder access during open access (Pro features like DYNO INTEL still need a subscription).
identityOptionalBeta: Early bird: free ladder access. Google sign-in still required.
betaEnterLeaderboard: Sign in and enter leaderboard (Pro free during early bird)
coreRequired: Unlock Core before you can link the Arena.
disclaimer: Beta mode. At launch, billing runs through App Store / Google Play.
coreGateBody: Unlock Core first—assessment, radar, and history stay local. No Arena fee.

subscriptionResult.successTitle: Access breached! Welcome to the Pro Hall
subscriptionResult.successBody: Subscription confirmed. Ladder, cloud backup, and full DYNO INTEL channels are now open.
subscriptionResult.failBody: The billing channel is temporarily unreachable (store or network). Retry shortly, or browse local features first.
subscriptionResult.authFailBody: Google sign-in is incomplete. Allow pop-ups and retry, or return to the console.
subscriptionResult.coreFailBody: Pro checkout requires Core ownership first. Assessment, radar, and history stay local — unlock Core, then return for Pro.
